task_objective: Defer status strip BrowserView recreation after lifecycle verification resets so Steam native teardown is not followed by same-tick recreation.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py::test_frontend_recreates_status_strip_before_lifecycle_verification to require a deferred BrowserView sync helper and cleanup of pending deferred sync timers.
design_decisions: Kept publishAutoSyncStatus synchronous and deferred only the BrowserView synchronization path with window.setTimeout(..., 0).
Guarded deferred callbacks against stale state object references and hidden status states.
Cleared pending deferred sync timers from hide, destroy, and dismount cleanup paths.
results: Targeted red test failed before implementation and passed after implementation.
Static frontend tests passed after implementation.
